description:
80+ Windows system tools in one Fluent app — cleaner, debloater, driver & service managers, hardware monitor, virus scan, network tools and AI diagnostics.

ULT1MAT3 PC Manager is a free Windows 10 and 11 desktop utility that bundles 80+ system tools into a single Fluent window. It includes a disk cleaner, a Windows debloater, device driver and service managers, real-time hardware and battery monitoring, on-demand virus scanning with quarantine, a network diagnostics toolkit, multi-step tune-up passes and AI-assisted analysis (using a local Ollama / llama.cpp model or a hosted model such as OpenAI, Anthropic or GitHub Models). It is local-first with no telemetry, creates System Restore snapshots before risky operations, and ships self-contained so no separate .NET runtime is required.
